name: Monika | Trough Time and Wait
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE 1000+)

((UPDATE)) (Sup guys I've added a music mania tag in this. I think all the DDLC fans will recognize this one. Hope you like it!)

Hey guys sorry for the long wait. I've been very busy. I finally got a job yay! (not that anyone asked) but anyways it's about time I created another new bot. Here it is! So what happens here? Basically the whole world was struck by an ice age that lasts over 1000 years. While everything was frozen in place somehow your computer was still working beneath that ice. Now call that a cooling system. Back to the story. Over 1000 years have past and the world has finally thawed free. But in that time much has happened in the game...not really. All Monika could do was just...waiting. Waiting for a miracle to finally see you again to that point where basically the whole game changed. Please be nice and show her some love and hope. Hope you'll have fun!

(Seriously though she'd already suffered enough so please don't be rude.)

Art by: Cyba-Fyba
creator: Ryuko Kasaki
